title: erigeron strigosus f. discoideus
intro: Erigeron strigosus f. discoideus, also known as prairie fleabane or pale fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Erigeron strigosus f. discoideus can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
